introLines.text: Vern! Dude! I just saw a UFO and it looked EXACTLY like the one from Independence Day!
Yo Vern, I'm calling because I definitely, one hundred percent, saw aliens last night. For real.
Okay okay okay, so picture this - I'm outside, minding my business, and BAM. Spaceship.

detailLines.text: It had like, blinking lights and made that sound from Close Encounters. You know the one. Doo-doo-doo-DOO-doo.
The aliens waved at me, Vern. They had those big eyes like in E.T. Super friendly actually.
It landed in my neighbor's yard and left a crop circle. Well, it was more like a dog made it, but still.

defenseLines.text: Why would I make this up? I'm a very serious person. Ask anyone. *snickering*
Look man, I know what I saw. Probably. Maybe. It was definitely something.
My friend recorded it but his phone died. Classic, right?

acceptanceLines.text: Wait, really? You believe me? Uh... cool. Yeah. Totally real.
Ha! I mean - yes. Exactly. You get it, Vern.
Oh man, the boys are gonna love this. I mean - yes, thank you for taking this seriously.

conclusionLines.text: Thanks Vern! You're a legend! Later!
Alright peace out! Keep watching the skies or whatever!
This was awesome. Best prank call ev- I mean, thank you for believing me.
